common.pom: Large global participation meme language tipping culture and recurring social activity show strong shared meaning and belonging
common.vision: Unite people through humor generosity and a shared Doge identity

comud.pom: High social engagement active contributors ongoing usage and strong emotional connection indicate durable community vitality and coherence
comud.vision: A thriving community where people feel connected joyful and part of something real

equilibrium.pom: Dogecoin supports payments tipping trading and liquidity with real usage sustained by recognizability accessibility and low fees
equilibrium.vision: Balance playful culture with useful low friction digital exchange

guide.pom: Active open source maintenance public contributors and visible community attention show ongoing direction without rigid central control
guide.vision: open community stewardship of a simple and friendly digital currency

success.pom: Strong brand recognition broad exchange support high liquidity and repeated relevance across market cycles reflect lasting cultural success
success.vision: Become the most loved and enduring meme based digital currency

vow.pom: Dogecoin remains rooted in meme culture tipping rituals playful identity and broad community participation across social and crypto spaces
vow.vision: Keep Doge fun generous and send every shib to the moon
